articles.title: Crude Oil Prices Today: Brent Drops to $73 as Strait of Hormuz Traffic Resumes Easing Supply Fears
articles.description: Crude oil prices fell on Friday with Brent trading near $73 a barrel as easing shipping restrictions in the Strait of Hormuz offset sudden panic from a fresh vessel attack near Oman.

articles.title: Goldman Sachs raises India's CY26 GDP growth forecast to 6.8%, cuts inflation, CAD estimates
articles.description: Goldman Sachs has upgraded India's macroeconomic outlook for calendar year 2026 following the recent US-Iran peace deal, raising its real GDP growth forecast while lowering its inflation and current account deficit projections, citing easing oil prices and improving domestic economic conditions.

articles.title: Asian shares plunge as traders sell to lock in profits after recent rallies driven by AI
articles.description: Asian markets tumbled, led by Japan and South Korea, as investors locked in profits from AI-related stock rallies, dragging down U.S. futures and oil prices.

articles.title: Iran latest - Firstpost
articles.description: A reported Iranian strike on the cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz has raised concerns over the future of Donald Trump's 60-day peace deal with Tehran. The attack prompted an UN agency to suspend its evacuation programme and briefly pushed oil prices higher

articles.title: Trump's Oil Price-Gouging Probe Is 'Socialism' He Accused Kamala Harris Of, Peter Schiff Says
articles.description: Economist Peter Schiff sees Trump's move to probe oil companies and high gas prices as socialist, draws parallels to Kamala Harris.

articles.title: Asian Markets Retreat: Apple's Price Shock and Tech Tensions
articles.description: Asian shares declined after a strong quarter, impacted by Apple's price hikes and tech sector volatility. Oil prices dropped due to resumed Saudi Aramco operations. Meanwhile, Japan's yen neared record lows, and the U.S. dollar maintained strength amid economic developments. Precious metals experienced significant price drops.

articles.title: Oil prices fall 2% as supply fears ease in Strait of Hormuz
articles.description: Oil prices fell sharply on Friday, heading for steep weekly losses as supply concerns eased with more tankers moving safely through the Strait of Hormuz, even as fresh regional tensions kept markets on edge.
